subcategory: glass-morphism video hero with fullscreen toggle
use_cases: Landing page hero section with video background
SaaS product showcase with modern glass aesthetic
ai_summary: A glass-morphism hero section featuring an auto-playing video background, glass-effect UI elements with backdrop blur and semi-transparent layers, and a toggle button to switch between full-screen and content-fit modes. Designed for modern SaaS landing pages with a purple/violet accent color scheme and subtle glow effects.
